name: Easterly Government Properties, Inc.
business: We are an internally managed REIT focused primarily on the acquisition, development and management of Class A commercial properties that are leased to U.S. Government agencies that serve essential functions. We generate approximately 90% of our revenue by leasing our properties to such agencies either directly or through the U.S. General Services Administration (GSA). As of December 31, 2025, we wholly owned 93 operating properties and three properties under development.

exposures.sentence: We rely on information technology in our operations, and any material failure, inadequacy, interruption or security failure of that technology could harm our business.
We are subject to risks from natural disasters and climate change.
We are subject to risks from natural disasters and climate change.

Because our principal tenants are agencies of the U.S. Government, our properties have a higher risk of terrorist attack and are more likely to be the site of civil unrest than similar properties leased to non-governmental tenants.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of 297,713 sq ft campus near Richmond, Virginia
catalysts.sentence: On January 16, 2026, we acquired a 297,713 leased square foot campus consisting of three real estate operating properties near Richmond, Virginia.
